element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Running, jumping, helmet bash through walls and enemies
Sword combat, bow and arrows for distance attacks and switch activation
Shield blocking, shield hang-gliding, shield as platform for allies
Each Viking must use unique skills to help others progress; all three must reach exit
Keys, bombs, food items; transfer between nearby characters
Combat avoidance and Baleog's offensive options
Three health points per viking; death makes level unwinnable; food restores health
Great heights cause health loss; navigation planning required
Intricate sequencing of all three vikings' abilities

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe zones between puzzle sections
Successful coordination of all three vikings
Exiting level after completing cooperative challenge
typical_tension_triggers: Threat of health loss from enemies or falls
Separation of vikings across level space
Permadeath mechanics for single character leading to level restart
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating puzzle complexity with alternating safe coordination phases and dangerous navigation segments; tension builds through level length and character separation distance

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of each viking's unique abilities separately; safe cooperation tutorial
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Complex coordination puzzles requiring all three vikings to contribute simultaneously; increased hazard complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multi-step sequences requiring precise timing and character positioning; advanced enemy encounters; sophisticated use of all abilities
notable_spikes: Introduction of complex multi-character puzzle sequences
Scenarios requiring shield-as-platform mechanics for height traversal
Levels demanding bow switch activation from distance while managing other characters

notable_level_patterns.description: Each Viking introduced with single signature ability focus, then combined in escalating complexity; players alternate control character-by-character through level
Progress blocked until all three vikings contribute unique skills; forward momentum requires synchronized character positioning
Olaf's shield creates human platforms allowing Erik/Baleog vertical access; requires character sequencing and spatial coordination
Baleog's bow activates switches from distance; enables solutions without direct character presence
Limited health (3 points), item scarcity, health restoration via food items; encourages careful navigation and cooperative resource sharing
